query: SELECT id, engagement_id, tool, target, LEFT(command, 200) as cmd, exit_code, duration_ms, timed_out, finding_count, LEFT(raw_stderr, 300) as stderr_preview, phase, created_at FROM scan_results WHERE engagement_id = 1350014 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
